title: Government Subsidized Private Rental Housing Listings - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Government Subsidized Private Rental Housing Listings 6 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HOMES FOR GOOD AGENCY-OWNED HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides listings of affordable housing complexes. 100 W 13th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Varies by property Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 682-3755 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) rental assistance, including a Homeownership Voucher Program. Also offers a Family Self-Sufficiency program, Housing Rehab program, and manages several area affordable housing complexes for families, farmworkers, older adults, and people with special needs. 135 NE Dunn Place Mcminnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Varies; some programs may have residency or income requirements. Call for information. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 883-4300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST COASTAL HOUSING RIDGE APARTMENTS THE RIDGE APARTMENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers 80 affordable apartment units. 3340 SE Harbor Drive Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Individuals making 50%-60% of the Area Median Income (AMI) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 996-7667 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers federal housing programs. Maintains a list of affordable housing and a bulletin board of local properties, including subsidized properties that are independently managed. Fields complaints about public housing and Section 8 housing. 147 S Main Avenue Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm; by appointment only Email (503) 861-0119 Get Directions Visit Website More Details REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT INC REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable rental housing. Applicants may be waitlisted. Does not offer rental assistance or emergency housing. 4150 S Moody Avenue Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 501-5733 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT PORTLAND FIELD OFFICE DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals and information about income-based housing through local Public Housing Authorities and other providers, Federal Housing Administration (FHA) loans, manufactured housing; and referrals to HUD-approved housing counseling agencies for foreclosure, purchase, reverse mortgage, and budgeting assistance. A list of HUD-funded housing is available online. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 972042825 Eligibility: Income restrictions vary by program. Acceptance of rental application is at apartment manager's discretion. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm, closed federal holidays Message line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 222-2600 0 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOMES FOR GOOD AGENCY-OWNED HOUSING HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY NORTHWEST COASTAL HOUSING THE RIDGE APARTMENTS NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT INC REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT
